search_queries_used: site:asahq.org perioperative blood management patient preferences discussion
site:doh.gov.ae day surgery blood product consent
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic management or dose instructions for Blood product discussion documentation
generic anesthesia landing pages without an exact section for Blood product discussion documentation
rejection_reasons: Thresholds and dosing would create management advice and were outside scope.
The candidate source category "blood-product dosing tables" did not provide exact documentation-only evidence for this workflow and was not mapped.
Autonomous management, medication, dose, procedure, escalation, or discharge instructions were outside the documentation-only scope.
Landing pages and search snippets were not accepted as exact evidence.
population_applicability: Patients undergoing procedures where bleeding, anemia, coagulopathy, transfusion, or patient preference is relevant.
setting_applicability: Direct for perioperative discussion documentation; transfusion decisions remain clinician-led.
UAE_applicability: International ASA evidence; UAE blood-bank, consent, and transfusion policy remains required.
recency_verification: Official ASA guideline published 2015 was reviewed on 2026-07-13; recency is a blocker.
superseded_check: No newer full ASA perioperative blood-management guideline was identified.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA section supports documenting a clinician-led blood-product risk, benefit, alternative, and preference discussion without recommending transfusion.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinician-documented discussion of blood products, risks, benefits, alternatives, and patient preferences without recommending transfusion.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA preanesthesia documentation section supports risk, airway, cardiorespiratory, reviewed-investigation, consultation, plan, and consent fields for Blood product discussion documentation; each remains clinician-entered and conditional on assessment.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports identity, disposition, medical, surgical and anesthetic history, medicines, allergies and reactions, fasting, advance directives, airway and cardiopulmonary examination, tests, consultations, ASA status, plan including postanesthesia and pain care, and consent.

unresolved_source_gaps: Transfusion indication, threshold, product selection, quantity, administration, refusal pathway, and emergency management remain unsupported.
Legacy duration presets, broad generic interval-history wording, and any content not explicitly mapped to an exact section remain unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No source mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, anesthesia plan, investigation, procedure, medication, dose, referral, discharge decision, or urgency conclusion.
UAE facility policy, credentialing, pathway, and qualified anesthesiologist review remain required before use.
